---
title: "Travel"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

<video class="hero-video-only" autoplay muted loop playsinline>
  <source src="images/travel-11.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

# Travel

Moments collected through travel — new cities, different cultures, and memories that broaden how I see the world.

<div class="media-gallery">
  <img src="images/travel-1.jpg" alt="Travel 1" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(0, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-2.jpg" alt="Travel 2" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(1, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-3.jpg" alt="Travel 3" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(2, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-4.jpg" alt="Travel 4" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(3, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-5.jpg" alt="Travel 5" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(4, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-6.jpg" alt="Travel 6" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(5, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-7.jpg" alt="Travel 7" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(6, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-9.jpg" alt="Travel 9" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(7, travelMedia)">
  <img src="images/travel-10.jpg" alt="Travel 10" class="media-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(8, travelMedia)">
  <div class="video-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(9, travelMedia)">▶ Video 1</div>
  <div class="video-thumb" onclick="openMediaModal(10, travelMedia)">▶ Video 2</div>
</div>

<script>
const travelMedia = [
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-1.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-2.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-3.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-4.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-5.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-6.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-7.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-9.jpg"},
  {type: "image", src: "images/travel-10.jpg"},
  {type: "video", src: "images/travel-11.mp4"},
  {type: "video", src: "images/travel-12.mp4"}
];
</script>

<script src="gallery.js"></script>
